title: Educational Institutions
description: Institutions that provides instructional or education related services to individuals or other organizations/institutions (e.g. High Schools, Colleges, Continuing Education providers).

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the institution

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the institution

homeInstitution.title: Home Institution
homeInstitution.description: Indicates if this is a 'home' or 'external' institution.

standardizedCodes.title: Standardized Codes
standardizedCodes.description: Standardized education-specific codes/IDs that are assigned to the institution.

country.title: Country
country.description: The country with specific educational institution codes.

oneOf.description: Codes for the United States of America.

code.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code.

ceeb.title: CEEB
ceeb.description: The CEEB code that is assigned to the institution.

addresses.title: Addresses
addresses.description: The physical locations where the institution resides or may be contacted by mail.

address.title: Address
address.description: The address associated with the location.

oneOf.title: Address
oneOf.description: The details associated with an existing address.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Address.

oneOf.title: Address Detail
oneOf.description: The details associated with an undefined address.

addressLines.title: Address
addressLines.description: The address lines of the institution's location, such as a street address, post office box number, or city, region, and postal code.

place.title: Place
place.description: A country specific postal region. Postal regions are expressed as a hierarchy of country, region, and sub-region, and as a locality with postal automation codes.

country.title: Country
country.description: The country specific postal region definition.

deliveryPoint.title: Delivery Point
deliveryPoint.description: A specific set of digits between 00 and 99 assigned to every address. When combined with the ZIP + 4 code, the delivery point provides a unique identifier for every deliverable address served by the US Postal Service.

carrierRoute.title: Carrier Route
carrierRoute.description: A subdivision of a US zipcode.

correctionDigit.title: Correction Digit
correctionDigit.description: A number used to check for errors in a US ZIP code, delivery point, or carrier route.

geographicAreas.title: Geographic Areas
geographicAreas.description: The geographic areas assigned to this location.

items.title: Geographic Areas
items.description: The geographic areas assigned to this location.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Geographic Areas.

type.title: Type
type.description: A type of location for the institution. Includes a standard type (e.g. 'main', 'support') and an optional, custom type to further identify the type of location.

addressType.title: Address Type
addressType.description: A mapping to a standard type for the address.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Additional details about the type of address.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The earliest date that this location was valid for the institution.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The latest date when this location was valid for the institution.

preference.title: Preferred Location
preference.description: Specifies if the location is preferred over others of the same type.

phones.title: Phone
phones.description: The phones and phone-connected devices at which the institution can be contacted.

type.title: Type
type.description: A type of phone for the institution. Includes a standard type (e.g., 'main', 'support') and an optional, custom type to further identify the type of phone.

phoneType.title: Type
phoneType.description: A type of phone contact for the institution.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Additional details about the type of phone.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

preference.title: Preferred Phone
preference.description: Specifies if the phone is preferred over others of the same type.

countryCallingCode.title: Country Calling Code
countryCallingCode.description: The country calling code of telephone and/or mobile device when dialing internationally.

number.title: Number
number.description: The number assigned to the phone.

extension.title: Extension
extension.description: The extension used to connect to the phone when multiple phones share the same primary number.

emails.title: Email
emails.description: The email addresses at which the institution can be contacted

type.title: Type
type.description: A type of email for the institution. Includes a standard type (e.g. 'general', 'hr') and an optional, custom type to further identify the type of email.

emailType.title: Type
emailType.description: A mapping to a standard type for the email type.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Additional details about the type of email.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

preference.title: Preferred Email
preference.description: Specifies if the email is preferred over others of the same type or overall.

address.title: Email Address
address.description: An email address for the institution.

socialMedia.title: Social Media
socialMedia.description: The social media account at which the institution can be contacted.

type.title: Social Media
type.description: A type of social media account for the institution. Includes a standard type (e.g. 'skype', 'facebook') and an optional, custom type to further identify the type of social media account.

socialMediaType.title: Type
socialMediaType.description: A type of social media account (e.g. 'skype', 'facebook').

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Additional details about the type of social media.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

preference.title: Preferred Social Media
preference.description: Specifies if the social media account is preferred over others of the same type.

address.title: Address
address.description: The username, handle or other address of the social media account.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Information that identifies a user to a system such as a network or computer.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of credential, such as "Person ID", "Organization ID", "System ID", etc.

value.title: Value
value.description: The current value of the credential.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The date when the credential becomes valid.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The date when the credential becomes invalid.

links.title: Credentials
links.description: Filter based on value and type in credentials
